query: Tesla Robotaxi Austin San Francisco employee testing summer rollout date service launch 2026

mako.raw:
{"query":"Tesla Robotaxi Austin San Francisco employee testing summer rollout date service launch 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1551,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/tesla-robotaxi-launch-austin-texas-elon-musk-june-22/","title":"Tesla's robotaxi service is set to debut today. Here's what to know. - CBS News","content":"On June 22, Tesla will give a select group of people the chance to ride in its Model Y Robotaxis in Austin, Texas, where the EV maker moved its headquarters from California in 2021.
According to a note from Wedbush Securities tech analyst Dan Ives, there could be up to 20 Model Y cars circling around Austin on Sunday.
In an X post from earlier this month, Musk teased the June 22 launch date and said the first driverless trip "from factory end of line all the way to a customer house" is set to take place on June 28.
The rollout of the robotaxi service, if successful, could help boost the company's fortunes after it faced intense backlash over Musk's involvement in the Trump administration's DOGE, noted Wedbush's Ives.
Tesla's first-quarter results fell short of expectations, with its profit tumbling 71% and its sales sliding 9% during the three-month period.
The robotaxi rollout could help Tesla reach a $2 trillion market cap by the end of 2026, or double its current valuation, according to Ives."},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2025/06/20/tesla-robotaxi-launch-austin.html","title":"Everything we know about Tesla's robotaxi launch in Austin","content":"The Elon Musk-led electric vehicle company is expected to roll out robotaxis in Austin, Texas, on June 22, with the first driverless trip from the factory to a customer house expected on his birthday, June 28.
Here's what we know about the Tesla event so far.
The initial rides will be in the Model Y and not the CyberCab that was unveiled in October.
In May, Musk confirmed plans to debut the service in Austin this month, with launches later set for Los Angeles and San Francisco.
That's about double its market value from Wednesday's close.
A group known as The Dawn Project, a tech safety organization that is critical of Tesla's autonomous capabilities, demonstrated a Tesla Model Y with currently available "Full Self Driving" software running past a stopped school bus and hitting a child-sized mannequin.
They would have stopped," Dawn Project founder Dan O'Dowd told CNBC's "Squawk on the Street" on Friday."},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/bradtempleton/2025/06/22/tesla-misses-robotaxi-launch-date-goes-with-safety-drivers/","title":"Tesla Misses Robotaxi Launch Date, Goes With Safety Drivers","content":"Instead, Tesla is operating a limited service with Tesla employees on board the vehicle to maintain safety.
Tesla will use an approach that was used in 2019 by Russian robotaxi company Yandex, putting the “safety driver” in the passenger’s seat rather than the driver’s seat.
(Yandex’s robotaxi was divested from Russian and now is called AVRide.)
Waymo started testing with safety drivers in 2009, gave rides to passengers with safety drivers in 2017, and without safety drivers in 2020 in the Phoenix area.
When Cruise did their first “driverless” demo ride in San Francisco, they had an employee in the passengers seat."},{"url":"https://www.teslaoracle.com/2025/06/21/tesla-tsla-sends-out-robotaxi-launch-invites-to-early-access-riders-service-begins-22nd-june/","title":"Tesla invites Robotaxi Early Access riders for 22nd June launch in Austin, Texas - Tesla Oracle","content":"Tesla (TSLA) has finally confirmed the Robotaxi service launch date, which is 22nd June.
Through this exclusive preview, you’ll have the opportunity to provide valuable feedback on our Robotaxi service.
Author of more than 1500 articles on Tesla, SpaceX, and EVs.
Last week, Tesla (TSLA) started testing the steering-less Cybercab robotaxi in Austin, Texas.
(TSLA) disclosed its first-quarter vehicle production and..."}]}

Geographic view of Tesla's robotaxi rollout across the United States. ## City-by-City Status. Key milestones in Tesla's robotaxi rollout. ### Tesla Robotaxi. Common questions about Tesla's robotaxi city rollout. As of January 2026, Tesla robotaxis operate in **Austin, Texas** (unsupervised rides, with some vehicles already running without safety monitors) and the **San Francisco Bay Area** (with safety drivers, required by California law). Tesla has announced expansion to Dallas, Houston, Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, and Las Vegas for the first half of 2026. At Tesla's Q4 2025 earnings call on January 28, 2026, the company announced plans to launch in **7 new cities** during H1 2026: Dallas, Houston, Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, and Las Vegas. Tesla told staff on Thursday it plans to launch its Robotaxi service in San Francisco this weekend, according to an internal memo viewed by Business Insider. The agency did not respond to questions regarding whether Tesla would be required to have a permit to launch its commercial robotaxi service with a safety monitor in the driver's seat. The California Public Utilities Commission told BI after this story first published that Tesla notified the agency on Thursday that it intended to \"extend operations under its TCP permit to offer service to friends and family of employees and to select members of the public.\" The CPUC granted Tesla a transportation charter permit in March that allows the company to provide a transportation service for employees.","score":0.58919704,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/SelfDrivingCars/comments/1m8ztrd/tesla_is_preparing_to_launch_its_robotaxi_service","title":"Tesla is preparing to launch its robotaxi service in San ...","content":"[Unverified] Tesla is preparing to roll out its robotaxi service in San Francisco and the Bay Area with a safety driver as soon as this weekend,","score":0.53590065,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.39,"request_id":"65b72ac3-bda1-4fba-af4c-5e93618d11ad"}
